askPlaceholder: Ask a task or chart question
openmrsRestSource: OpenMRS REST when on a patient chart
subtitle: Tasks and chart guidance
taskGuidanceAnswer: I can help with clinical encounters, lab workflow, dispensing, registration, queueing, and patient chart summaries.
taskGuidanceStep1: Choose the workflow you want to complete.
taskGuidanceStep2: Ask a direct question about the task.
taskGuidanceStep3: Open a patient chart when the question needs patient-specific context.
welcomeAnswer: Ask about a workflow or open a patient chart and ask for a summary.
welcomeStep1: Select a quick action or type a question.
welcomeStep2: Workflow questions are answered from built-in knowledge first.
welcomeStep3: Patient-specific answers use the current OpenMRS session and are read-only.
